headline: Federal government cuts 60 communication posts following CHF 25M budget reduction
summary: Swiss Federal Council eliminated 60 FTE positions in federal communications after parliament cut budget by 25 million francs.

headline: Blatten VS landslide: 300+ residents homeless, environmental historian says it was not worst case
summary: Environmental historian assessed the Valais rockslide displacement of over 300 people, noting worse outcomes were geologically possible.

headline: Geneva cantonal council authorizes anti-G7 march with strict conditions ahead of June 14 summit
summary: Geneva state council formalised conditional protest authorisation restricting route to right bank, No-G7 coalition asked for reflection time.

headline: Switzerland puts neutrality and nutrition initiatives to autumn vote on 27 September
summary: Federal Council confirmed SVP neutrality initiative and nutrition sovereignty initiative will face popular vote on 27 September 2026.

headline: Nestlé quietly launches Simpli Water filtered-water line at Vaud's Henniez plant
summary: Nestlé Waters Switzerland launched filtered water brand Simpli Water at Henniez in Vaud, two years after the illegal filter scandal.

headline: Hungary enters new era after 16 Orbán years: euphoria tempered by structural obstacles
summary: Analysis of Hungary's political transition after Orbán's era, noting public optimism alongside significant institutional and economic challenges.

headline: Israel kills Hamas military wing leader Mohammed Odeh; Lebanon's Nabatieh under forced displacement order
summary: Israel struck and killed Mohammed Odeh, Hamas military wing leader; separately issued forced displacement orders for Lebanon's Nabatieh city.

headline: Iran deal terms: Hormuz transit and troop withdrawal stipulated in emerging agreement
summary: Iranian officials indicated Hormuz navigation and phased troop withdrawal are terms of an emerging agreement; Lebanon front remains without ceasefire.

headline: Spain police enter PM Sanchez's Socialist Party headquarters in corruption probe
summary: Spanish police raided PSOE's Madrid HQ as corruption investigations widened to circle the Sanchez government.

headline: Bangladesh seeks IMF emergency aid as Iran war ripples through economy
summary: Bangladesh turned to IMF for support as Iran-theatre conflict disrupts shipping and drives commodity price spikes affecting its export economy.

headline: DRC faces catastrophic collision of Ebola outbreak and armed conflict, WHO warns
summary: WHO DG Tedros warned DRC faces simultaneous Ebola outbreak and armed conflict blocking humanitarian access needed to stop transmission.

headline: CVE-2026-9082 Drupal Core SQL injection on CISA KEV, remediation due today
summary: CISA KEV-listed Drupal Core SQL injection with CVSS 9.8 reached its remediation deadline of 27 May 2026.

headline: CVE-2026-8054 dotCMS unauthenticated SQL injection CVSS 10.0 allows full DB read/write
summary: Perfect-10 unauthenticated SQL injection in dotCMS Core through 26.04.28-02 exposes Publish Audit API endpoints to arbitrary database manipulation.

headline: CVE-2026-9312 GitHub Enterprise Server SSRF exploitable without authentication CVSS 9.2
summary: Unauthenticated SSRF in GitHub Enterprise Server allows path traversal in upload endpoint to reach internal services and harvest credentials.

headline: CVE-2026-7524 IBM Langflow OSS RCE via symlink in archive extraction CVSS 9.8
summary: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0-1.9.1 allows remote code execution via symlink validation flaw during archive extraction.

headline: CVE-2025-12686 Synology BeeStation Manager buffer overflow enables remote code execution CVSS 9.8
summary: Buffer overflow in Synology BeeStation Manager AdminCenter before 1.3.2-65648 allows remote code execution.

headline: arXiv 2605.26343: MechRL uses RL agents to automate mechanistic interpretability circuit discovery
summary: MechRL recasts transformer circuit discovery as an RL problem, enabling automated identification of attention-head circuits for specific model behaviours.

headline: arXiv 2605.26526: Open-weight LLM fine-tuning safety defenses fail against simple adversarial attacks
summary: Study shows open-weight LLM fine-tuning defenses share a flawed premise and are bypassed by simple attacks exploiting latent harmful knowledge.

headline: arXiv 2605.26282: Scaling world-model RL via diffusion policy optimization achieves stronger results
summary: Identifies policy-world-model misalignment as main MBRL scaling bottleneck and addresses it via diffusion policy optimisation.

headline: arXiv 2605.26496: Dense2MoE converts dense LLMs to MoE via unified pruning and upcycling for on-device LLMs
summary: Dense2MoE jointly prunes and upcycles dense LLMs into MoE architectures, achieving better on-device inference efficiency than either approach alone.

headline: arXiv 2605.26289: Stateful inference framework cuts latency for multi-agent tool-calling LLMs
summary: Stateful inference architecture caches prior-turn KV state in multi-agent LLM workflows, cutting per-turn cost from O(n_t) to O(delta_t).
